comment: Processes an order and logs to audit

routine_def:
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE app.sync_products()
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $procedure$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO audit.audit_log (table_name, action) VALUES ('products', 'synced');
END;
$procedure$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app.fn_inner()
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
  SELECT count(*) FROM app.orders;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app.fn_wrapper()
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
  SELECT app.fn_inner();
$function$
